original_image_tags: The back of a document, appearing to be the reverse side of a filing folder or heavy paper sheet. It is beige/aged paper with two hole-punch marks at the top, one of which has a torn edge. A piece of yellowed tape is attached horizontally near the top right corner. There is faint, reversed text bleeding through from the other side of the paper.

elements.description: Back of a document page. Two hole-punch marks are visible at the top edge. A faded, illegible block of typed text is visible from the reverse side. There is no front-facing photograph, sketch, diagram, or map.

judge.reason: Both descriptions consistently identify the page as the back of a document with two hole-punch marks and faint reversed text from the other side, describing the same visual content with no substantive disagreement.
